title: Tan Kim Her: India's doubles coach who turns broken partnerships into gold
indian_angle: Tan Kim Her is a key coach for Indian doubles pairs, instrumental in their success on the international stage.
summary: A look into the coaching philosophy and impact of Tan Kim Her, India's doubles coach, and his role in transforming Indian badminton partnerships.

title: An Se-young's dominance over PV Sindhu continues at Indonesia Open
indian_angle: This report highlights the ongoing challenge for India's star shuttler PV Sindhu against the world's top player.
summary: PV Sindhu faced another defeat against World No. 1 An Se-young at the Indonesia Open, extending her losing streak against the Korean champion.

title: Ayush Shetty challenges Chinese World No 15 Weng Hong Yang
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Ayush Shetty put up a strong fight against a higher-ranked Chinese opponent, showing promising potential.
summary: Ayush Shetty delivered a challenging performance against China's World No. 15 Weng Hong Yang, demonstrating his growing prowess on the international stage.

title: BAI invites Expression of Interest for BWF World Championships 2026
indian_angle: India is actively pursuing the opportunity to host the prestigious BWF World Championships in 2026, a significant event for Indian badminton.
summary: Badminton Association of India has issued an Expression of Interest for hosting the BWF World Championships 2026, with New Delhi being a potential venue.

title: Grassroot Coaches Development Program announced for Guwahati & Raipur
indian_angle: This program aims to strengthen badminton at the grassroots level in India by developing coaches in key regional centers.
summary: BAI has announced a Coaches Development Program at the Grassroot Level to be held in NCE Guwahati and Raipur from June 12-21, 2026.

title: The 'Four Eyes' guiding Satwik & Chirag to success
indian_angle: This feature provides insight into the crucial support system behind India's top men's doubles pair, Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty.
summary: An article exploring the key individuals and strategies that contribute to the consistent performance and success of the Indian men's doubles duo, Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty.
